title: Pluck
body:
Pluck allows for the plucking of blocks. Simply add a block to the `pluck:pickable` block tag and left click it to pluck. Config is included an can specify whether or not the item will go straight into the inventory.


![Plucking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yFbwQXGT/images/b23a4a800291203f65b89273282f884d3271d5d2.gif)
